sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n17950" key="au)tosxidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αὐτο-σχῐδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n17950.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">simply slit: simple,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὑπόδημα</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0252.tlg001:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hermipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">αὐτοσχεδές.</foreign> </sense> </entryFree>
